name: almi-swiss
description: AlmiSwiss — AI-powered Swiss integration-exam practice in the AlmiWorld family. fide (German and French) for naturalisation and the C permit, canton civic knowledge, and SEM-recognised certificate routes (telc/Goethe-Zertifikat, DELF/TCF), with honest per-skill readiness bands and AI feedback — no fabricated composite. Separate product (almiswiss.almiworld.com). Original content — never copied from official exam material. Naturalisation language requirements are a FEDERAL minimum and vary by canton — every surface says so.

scripts.build: node scripts/seo/countries-axis-gate.mjs && node scripts/seo/fork-hygiene-gate.mjs && node scripts/seo/real-entity-gate.mjs && node scripts/seo/uniqueness-gate.mjs && tsx scripts/items/verify-items.mts && prisma generate && prisma migrate deploy && next build
